name: Pips Pumpkin Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the 3 eggs for 5 minutes.
2. Slowly add sugar, pumpkin, lemon juice, flour, baking powder, ginger, cinnamon, and salt to the eggs.
3. Grease and flour a small cookie sheet (jelly roll pan).
4. Pour in the mixture and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
5. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the "cake" and place on a linen towel. (Sprinkle the towel with powdered sugar as well.)
6. Roll up the cake and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
7. For the filling, mix together 1 cup powdered sugar, softened cream cheese, butter, and vanilla.
8. Spread the mixture over the "cake."
9. Roll again and refrigerate.
10. Slice and enjoy. This recipe can easily be doubled.
